project: PRJ03277 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-02 - MFC
PRJ02707 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-4838_T-4850_T-5654_T-6238 - PLT
comment: Performed the initial dynamic passes without seeing water ingress, so the decision was to increase the rate. Meantime there were further issues with the tools, likely caused by H2S exposure. With the READ tools there were intermittent QP/CCL issues requiring tool enabling to get the signal back. During the first down pass of the third regime the GR signal was lost passing SS#2 and couldn't be regained by enabling the tool. The Slick FAST tool also died. Completed 4 x down and up passes without the interpretation showing any water entry points. Currently shuttin in the well from flow and purging with nitrogen prior to POOH,

project: PRJ03209 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GFN42 (N-42A)_GFN52 (N-52)_GFN38 (N-38) - MFC
comment: Equipment arrived back in Esbjerg, 44176 will be offloaded Esvagt Leah today
